# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-a-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-a
  port: 8080

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-b-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-b
  port: 9090

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-a-to-service-b-auth
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: service-b-server
  client:
    serviceAccounts:
      - name: service-a-sa
        namespace: default

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-b-to-service-a-auth
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: service-a-server
  client:
    serviceAccounts:
      - name: service-b-sa
        namespace: default
